title: G.Skill Trident Z Neo DDR4 3600 2x16GB CL16
description: Description I'm parting out my gaming PC because I don't use it anymore. This auction if for 2x16GB of G.Skill Trident Z Neo. In my opinion this is the best quality DDR4 RAM and it looks great. I've never had any trouble running the XMP profile. These will work in both Intel and AMD systems. Just check that you CPU and motherboard can handle 3600 MT/S. DDR4 2 x 16GB kit (32GB total) 3600 MT/S CL 16-19-19-39 1.35 V I don't have the original box but they will come in an anti static bag with bubble wrap. This is a $1 reserve auction. Pick up from Taupo or courier by NZ Post nation wide. Check out my other listings for more PC parts.
